dict.string: A task you run may need to read or save files on your Desktop. OpenCoworker never scans this folder on its own.
A task you run may need to read or save files in Documents. OpenCoworker never scans this folder on its own.
A task you run may need to read or save files in Downloads. OpenCoworker never scans this folder on its own.
A task you run may need to read an image from your photo library. OpenCoworker never scans your photos on its own.
